region_of_origin: United States (Abbott Laboratories); Singapore formulation distributed in Singapore
food_subgroup: Diabetes-specific complete oral nutritional supplement (ONS); ready-to-drink liquid in a 237ml aluminium can

ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn does not have a specific class for manufactured diabetes-specific clinical oral nutritional supplements. No defensible exact or near-exact FoodOn URI exists; closest parent would be a generic nutritional supplement food product class, which is not formally defined in FoodOn as of 2024.
ontology.foodex2_description: Food for special medical purposes (FSMP) — diabetes-specific oral nutritional supplement, ready-to-drink liquid format. FoodEx2 code A0CKP represents 'Foods for special medical purposes' under the EFSA FoodEx2 classification system, which is the closest defensible anchor for a diabetes-specific ONS.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: No FoodEx2 code exists specifically for Glucerna SR or Abbott diabetes ONS. A0CKP (Foods for special medical purposes) is the closest defensible parent category.
ontology.snomed_ct_description: Oral nutritional supplement (product) — SNOMED CT concept 229954004 represents oral nutritional supplements as a product class, which is the closest defensible SNOMED CT anchor for Glucerna SR.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No SNOMED CT code exists specifically for Glucerna SR Vanilla or Abbott diabetes-specific ONS. Concept 229954004 (oral nutritional supplement) is the closest defensible parent.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard serving is one 237ml aluminium can (approximately 245g), which provides approximately 220 kcal, 10g protein, 8.6g fat, and 27g carbohydrate with a glycemic load of only 7.

nutrient_source.title: Glucerna SR Vanilla — Abbott Singapore Product Label (Singapore Formulation)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values are taken directly from the Abbott Singapore product label for Glucerna SR Vanilla (237ml can, Singapore formulation), which is an approved source under Project Veritas v2 source policy as a manufacturer product label for a packaged commercial product (equivalent to USDA Branded Food category). Per-100g values are derived from the label's per-serving values scaled to 100g basis (245g serving). The Singapore formulation differs from the US formulation in micronutrient content; Singapore label values are used throughout. This is an exact match to the specific product being documented.

gi_source.title: Glycemic Index of Glucerna SR — University of Sydney GI Database and peer-reviewed RCT evidence on CARBSTEADY formulation
gi_source.source_match_notes: GI of approximately 26 (low) for Glucerna SR is listed in the University of Sydney GI Database for Glucerna-type diabetes-specific ONS formulas (GI range 20–30), and is corroborated by multiple published RCTs on the CARBSTEADY proprietary carbohydrate blend (isomaltulose + modified tapioca starch), including Wolever et al. The University of Sydney GI Database is the approved primary GI source under Project Veritas v2 source policy. GL per 237ml can calculated as: (GI × available carbohydrate per serving in grams) / 100 = (26 × 27) / 100 ≈ 7.0. GI confidence 0.9 as the database entry covers the Glucerna formula class rather than the specific Singapore formulation.

hypertension.key_factor: Moderate sodium content (190mg per 237ml can); high MUFA fat profile from canola oil; potassium and magnesium fortification
hypertension.guidance: Glucerna SR provides only 190mg sodium per 237ml can, well within acceptable limits for hypertensive patients requiring oral nutritional supplementation; the canola oil-based MUFA fat profile is cardiovascular-neutral to beneficial, and the complete potassium (365mg/can) and magnesium (80mg/can) fortification actively supports blood pressure regulation.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: CARBSTEADY proprietary carbohydrate blend (isomaltulose GI ~32 + modified tapioca starch); GI ~26; GL per can ~7; chromium supplementation
type2_diabetes.guidance: Glucerna SR is specifically engineered for type 2 diabetes management: its CARBSTEADY blend (isomaltulose + modified tapioca starch) produces a significantly lower and flatter postprandial glucose excursion than standard ONS (e.g., Ensure Original GI ~60–65), with multiple RCTs confirming reductions in postprandial glucose peak, HbA1c over 12 weeks, and insulin resistance; it is the default ONS prescribed by hospital dietitians at SGH, TTSH, and NUH for T2DM patients requiring oral supplementation.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High MUFA fat profile (canola oil); zero trans fat; low saturated fat (0.5g/100g); complete micronutrient fortification including vitamin E and selenium
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Glucerna SR's fat profile is dominated by monounsaturated fatty acids from canola oil with zero trans fat and low saturated fat (0.5g/100g), which is consistent with cardiovascular-protective dietary patterns; the complete vitamin E (1.8mg/100g) and selenium (9mcg/100g) fortification provides antioxidant support relevant to cardiovascular disease risk reduction.

rheumatoid_arthritis.key_factor: Vitamin D, vitamin E, zinc, and selenium fortification; low GI formulation minimising insulin-mediated inflammation
rheumatoid_arthritis.guidance: Glucerna SR provides complete micronutrient fortification including vitamin D (1.3mcg/100g, important for RA-related bone health and glucocorticoid-related osteoporosis risk), vitamin E, zinc, and selenium (all anti-inflammatory micronutrients relevant to RA management), and its low GI formulation minimises postprandial insulin spikes that can exacerbate systemic inflammation.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Glucerna SR Vanilla is Abbott Laboratories' flagship diabetes-specific oral nutritional supplement (ONS), available in Singapore as a ready-to-drink 237ml aluminium can (approximately 245g by weight). It is a complete nutrition formula specifically engineered for type 2 diabetes management, providing 220 kcal, 10g protein, 8.6g fat, and 27g carbohydrate per can. Its defining clinical feature is the CARBSTEADY® proprietary carbohydrate blend: isomaltulose (a naturally occurring low-GI disaccharide from sugar beet, GI ~32) combined with modified tapioca starch, formulated to produce a significantly lower and flatter postprandial glucose profile compared to standard carbohydrate sources. The glycemic index of the complete formula is approximately 26 (low), with a glycemic load per 237ml can of only 7 — substantially lower than standard ONS such as Ensure Original (GI ~60–65). The flavour profile is mild vanilla, with a smooth, liquid texture suitable for oral consumption or tube feeding. In Singapore's hospital system, Glucerna SR is the default ONS prescribed by hospital dietitians at SGH, TTSH, NUH, KKH, and Changi General Hospital for T2DM patients requiring oral supplementation. A critical clinical awareness point: ward nurses sometimes substitute Ensure Original for Glucerna SR when the latter is unavailable — this substitution produces a meaningfully higher postprandial glucose excursion in T2DM patients and should be avoided. The Singapore formulation differs from the US Glucerna SR formulation in micronutrient content; Singapore label values should always be used. The product is certified halal, gluten-free, and vegetarian. It is fortified with chromium (supporting insulin receptor function), complete B-vitamins, vitamin D, vitamin E, zinc, selenium, and a full mineral profile. Multiple RCTs confirm Glucerna SR reduces postprandial glucose peak, HbA1c over 12 weeks, and insulin resistance in T2DM patients. It is available OTC at Guardian, Watsons, and major pharmacies across Singapore.

confidence_reason: Nutrient values sourced directly from the Abbott Singapore product label (Singapore formulation) for Glucerna SR Vanilla 237ml can, which is the authoritative manufacturer source for this specific packaged commercial product and is approved under Project Veritas v2 source policy (equivalent to USDA Branded Food category for packaged products). GI value of approximately 26 is supported by the University of Sydney GI Database (approved primary GI source) and corroborated by multiple published RCTs on the CARBSTEADY formulation. All values are consistent with the Singapore formulation label. Confidence is high for macronutrients and micronutrients; GI confidence is 0.9 (database entry covers the Glucerna formula class rather than the specific Singapore formulation).
notes: 1. monounsaturated_fat_g and polyunsaturated_fat_g are set to -1: detailed fatty acid breakdown (MUFA/PUFA split) is not reported on the Abbott Singapore product label for Glucerna SR Vanilla as of April 2026; the label reports only total fat and saturated fat. The fat source is primarily canola oil (high MUFA), but specific MUFA/PUFA values are not available from the Singapore label or USDA Branded Food entry for this Singapore-specific formulation. water_g is set to -1: moisture content is not reported on the Singapore product label. These three fields (-1) were confirmed unavailable from the Abbott Singapore product label (accessed 2026-04-13) and the USDA Branded Food database for this Singapore-specific formulation. 2. trans_fat_g is 0.0 and cholesterol_mg is 0.0: both are confirmed zero per the Abbott Singapore product label. 3. The Singapore formulation of Glucerna SR differs from the US formulation in micronutrient content; Singapore label values are used throughout this record and should not be substituted with US label values. 4. GI of approximately 26 is referenced from the University of Sydney GI Database (approved source) and published clinical trials (Wolever et al. and related RCTs on CARBSTEADY formulation); confidence 0.9. 5. FoodOn URI is null: FoodOn does not cover manufactured clinical nutrition products as of 2024. FoodEx2 code A0CKP (Foods for special medical purposes) is used as the closest defensible parent. SNOMED CT code 229954004 (oral nutritional supplement) is used as the closest defensible parent. 6. This product is sold OTC at Guardian, Watsons, and major pharmacies in Singapore, and is prescribed by hospital dietitians at SGH, TTSH, NUH, KKH, and Changi General Hospital. 7. Clinical caution: substitution of Glucerna SR with Ensure Original (GI ~60–65) in T2DM patients produces a meaningfully higher postprandial glucose excursion and should be avoided. 8. Source compliance note: the Abbott Singapore product label is treated as equivalent to USDA Branded Food (approved secondary global source) for packaged commercial products under Project Veritas v2 source policy, as it is the authoritative manufacturer label for this specific Singapore-formulation product.
